fields.name: SOLSTICE · WASD carry the sun · SPACE flare

worldData.instructions:
You are the sun. A/D swing across the sky · W/S raise and lower · SPACE solar flare (burns cloud, spikes heat — careful).
Light the groves to grow them; scorch and frost both kill.
All five groves in bloom at once = a solstice.

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: SOLSTICE: the player is the sun — light-scheduling ecology with scorch/frost, hunting cloud, seasons
